hero.title: Software for Voluntary Pension Management
hero.description:
Our voluntary pension management software is a comprehensive solution designed for voluntary pension fund operators and/or voluntary savings in Latin America.



With a customer-centric and sustainability-focused approach, we offer a robust platform that facilitates the efficient administration of funds and provides transparency and traceability in all operations.

ventajas.description: Regulatory changes with the rapid implementation of updates on our platform, ensuring compliance with constantly evolving regulations.

funcionalidades.title: Software functionalities for comprehensive pension fund management

items.title: Voluntary savings and personalized investment
items.description: Allows enabling menus by user profile and configuring credit lines, rates, and quota types.

items.title: Timely and reliable information

items.title: Automation of massive processes

items.title: Strict contribution control

items.title: Integrated regulatory reports

cta.title: Optimize the digital transformation of pension funds now
cta.description:
Ready to take pension management to the next level? Discover how our comprehensive solution can simplify your processes, ensure regulatory compliance, and improve customer experience.



Contact us today for a customized demonstration and begin the digital transformation of your pension fund!

items.question: What is the difference between mandatory and voluntary pensions in LATAM?

answer.descriptions: Mandatory pensions are required by law and are deducted from the worker's salary, while voluntary pensions are additional contributions an individual chooses to make for better retirement.

items.question: How do I digitize the pension system in my financial institution?

answer.descriptions: Through our comprehensive platform, you can migrate your databases, automate contribution management, and provide a modern interface to your affiliates in record time.

items.question: Does this software work for managing retirement savings?

answer.descriptions: Yes, the platform has specialized modules for the administration, investment, and yield calculation of retirement savings.

items.question: Does it also work for voluntary pension savings (APV)?

answer.descriptions: Absolutely, our software is designed to handle APV schemes, adapting to the tax benefits and regulations of each country.

items.question: Can it be used to manage retirements?

answer.descriptions: Yes, the system manages the complete cycle, from the accumulation phase to the decumulation phase and payment of pension installments or retirements.

items.question: Is the software multi-country and multi-currency?

answer.descriptions: That's right. Our solution is designed to operate in multiple LATAM countries, supporting multiple currencies, and adapting to the local regulations of each region.
